description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Open-gorotto 2.0a 2006/02/08 edition, 2006/03/19 edition, and 2006/04/07 edition before 20070416 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via unspecified parameters to (1) pub/modules/d/_top.html; (2) /pub/modules/a/_access.html; (3) _circletop.html or (4) _cir66.html in pub/modules/ci/; or (5) _fri66.html, (6) _inv66.html, (7) _top.html, (8) _friends.html, or (9) _fri33.html in pub/modules/f/.
